title: The 7 Best Boring Stocks to Buy for Red-Hot Returns

title: Steel Dynamics' (STLD) Earnings and Sales Top Estimates in Q3

title: Steel Dynamics: Long, Even With Relaxed Steel Prices
text: Low growth and steel price reduction assumptions in DCF still indicate a buy when holding for ten years. STLD exhibits increasing dividends, share repurchases, earning wins, excellent financials and peer performance.
